nasb.text: God helped him against the Philistines, and against the Arabians who lived in Gur-baal, and the Meunites.

esv.text: God helped him against the Philistines and against the Arabians who lived in Gurbaal and against the Meunites.

cnv.text: 神幫助他攻打非利士人和住在姑珥．巴力的阿拉伯人，以及米烏尼人。

ccb.text: 上帝帮助他攻打非利士人和住在姑珥·巴力的阿拉伯人及米乌尼人。
